block_01: Enhance your results with a trading journal
block_02: Trading journal is one tool that many beginner traders tend to overlook. However, it has the potential to considerably improve your trading routine.
block_03: A trading journal may help you identify market trends and patterns, spot common mistakes and monitor your progress. The key is consistency: you should keep notes of your trades regularly to see the results. Find practical tips on how to start and maintain a trading journal in this article.
